summary: P0.5 Dashboard 'Make it look alive' upgrade testing complete. All 12 features verified via Playwright. Frontend: 100% pass rate. The dashboard successfully implements truth-based hype text (no zeros), social proof badges, rotating hero carousel, hover motion previews, scroll trap, and shimmer animations.
critical_code_review_comments: Truth-based hype text correctly implemented: '0 today' shows as 'Fresh stories waiting', '0 continuations' shows as 'Be the first to continue'
Social proof badges working: 'Just dropped' (emerald) for 0 continuations, 'Early story' (violet) for 1-9, 'Trending' (amber) for 10+
Hero carousel rotates every 6 seconds with 5 progress dots visible
Pause on hover working - carousel stops when mouse hovers over hero section
Story card hover motion preview working - zoom effect (scale 1.09) on hover
Scroll trap section with dynamic hook text and 3 animated pulsing dots
Shimmer/glow animation on 10 CTA buttons via shimmer-cta class
First Mover Advantage CTA: 'Be first to continue' (green) for 0-continuation stories
No '0 today', '0 continued', or '0 continuations' text visible anywhere on dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0.5 'Make it look alive' dashboard upgrade testing complete. All features verified: (1) Live stats show '59 stories created', 'Fresh stories waiting', 'Be the first to continue' - no zeros displayed. (2) Hero section has hook text in quotes, CONTINUE THIS STORY/TRENDING NOW label, Continue This Story + Create Your Version buttons. (3) Hero carousel with 5 progress dots, rotates every 6 seconds, pauses on hover. (4) 8 story cards in Trending Stories grid with social proof badges (7 'Just dropped', 1 'Early story'). (5) First Mover Advantage: 'Be first to continue' green CTA for 0-continuation stories, 'Continue Story' amber CTA for others. (6) Scroll trap section with dynamic hook text and 3 animated pulsing dots. (7) Shimmer-cta animation on 10 buttons. (8) Story card hover shows zoom effect (scale 1.09).

Feature_2_Live_Stats_Truth_Based.details: Shows '59 stories created', 'Fresh stories waiting' (not '0 today'), 'Be the first to continue' (not '0 continuations')

Feature_3_Hero_Hook_Text.details: Hero displays story hook text in quotes (e.g., 'A brave little rabbit named Clover explored the enchanted meadow...')

Feature_4_Hero_Labels_Buttons.details: CONTINUE THIS STORY label visible, 'Continue This Story' and 'Create Your Version' buttons present

Feature_5_Hero_Progress_Dots.details: 5 progress dots visible at bottom of hero section

Feature_6_Hero_Carousel_Rotation.details: Hero content changes after 6 seconds (verified: Clover rabbit story → Cat city adventure story)

Feature_7_Hero_Pause_On_Hover.details: Carousel pauses when mouse hovers over hero section - content did NOT change during 7 second hover

Feature_8_Trending_Stories_Grid.details: 8 story cards displayed in Trending Stories section

Feature_9_Social_Proof_Badges.details: Badges visible: 7 'Just dropped' (emerald), 1 'Early story' (violet). No '0 continued' text.

Feature_10_First_Mover_CTA.details: 'Be first to continue' green CTA for 0-continuation stories, 'Continue Story' amber CTA for stories with continuations

Feature_11_Scroll_Trap.details: Scroll trap section with dynamic hook text ('But this story doesn't end here…') and 3 animated pulsing dots

Feature_12_Shimmer_Animation.details: 10 buttons have shimmer-cta animation class for glow effect

Feature_13_Hover_Motion_Preview.details: Story card images zoom on hover (transform scale from 1 to 1.09)

Feature_14_No_Zeros_Displayed.details: No '0 today', '0 continued', or '0 continuations' text found anywhere on dashboard

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Story feed endpoint returns live_stats with stories_today=0 and total_continuations=0, frontend correctly displays truth-based hype text instead.
